title: Next.js 16 Frontend Starter
description: A production-ready foundation with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, i18n, multi-theme support, auth flows, and opinionated architecture — so you can ship features, not boilerplate.

integrated.title: Integrated stack
integrated.subtitle: Packages and tools wired up with icons — ready to build on.

pageGroups.title: Explore the starter
pageGroups.subtitle: Route groups with live and placeholder pages — click through to preview each section.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Login, register, and forgot-password flows are implemented with forms, validation, and mock API hooks.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Protected app shell with overview, profile, settings, and billing placeholder pages.

legal.title: Legal
legal.description: Privacy, terms, and cookie policy placeholder pages for compliance.

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: 404, 401, 403, 500, and maintenance pages with humor, status codes, and navigation.

roadmap.title: Future releases
roadmap.subtitle: What is planned next now that auth forms, themes, and the service layer foundation are in place.

testing.title: Testing suite
testing.description: Playwright end-to-end tests and Vitest unit tests with example coverage.

deployment.title: Deployment workflows
deployment.description: Automated deploy to staging and production environments.

errorHandling.title: Error handling
errorHandling.description: Centralized error handling with Axios and React Query.

footer.copyright: © {year} Next.js Frontend Starter. All rights reserved.
